care.summary: A clustering cactus with elongated, finger-like stems covered in golden or pale spines.
care.light: Bright direct to indirect light; south or west window ideal
care.water: Water sparingly; allow soil to fully dry between waterings. Reduce in winter
care.soil: Very well-draining cactus or succulent mix with extra perlite or pumice
care.humidity: Low; does well in dry indoor air
care.fertilizer: Dilute cactus fertilizer every 4-6 weeks during spring and summer only
care.toxicity: Non-toxic but spines are sharp — handle with care
common_issues: Rot from overwatering or poor drainage
tips: Use a porous terracotta pot to help soil dry faster
Reduce watering to near-dry in winter dormancy
Repot every 2-3 years as clumps outgrow the pot
